Package com.kbtu.university.model.user

Class Teacher

java.lang.Object
com.kbtu.university.model.user.User
com.kbtu.university.model.user.Employee
com.kbtu.university.model.user.Teacher
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
Manager
public class Teacher extends Employee
A teaching employee. Owns a list of courses, can put marks, view enrolled students, send messages, send complaints, and accumulate ratings from students.
See Also:
